//: Dev-only overrides. Apply with `cargo tauri dev --config tauri.conf.dev.json` when running through Vite HMR. Production CSP in tauri.conf.json stays strict.

security.csp: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ws://localhost:5173 http://localhost:5173
